posts.text: Today Hindalco mgmt on TV stated the hike in CPC and CTP prices. He also said they expect a further hike in the coming year. Rain ind stock reacted positively to it.

posts.author: kushal_kapoor
posts.community: Rain Industries - An oversold de-leveraging play
posts.text: Now JP Morgan has confirmed this too, what Rain’s management mentioned in their earnings presentation: Hidden Time Bomb in Aluminum Markets: JPMorgan Warns Petroleum Coke Supply Disruption Could Trigger Next Aluminum Price Surge. JPMorgan’s latest report warns that approximately 20% of the global supply of petroleum coke, a critical raw material for aluminum smelting, faces direct threat from a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Petroleum coke prices have risen only 21% so far, far behind crude oil’s surge of over 50%, signaling the market is severely underestimating this risk. Against the back…
